title: 10 best herbal creams for nipple pain during breastfeeding
description: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, creams helps with nipple pain during breastfeeding because of its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The cream's active compounds, such as triterpenoids and carotenoids, help to reduce swelling and irritation, promoting faster healing of cracked and sore nipples. Calendula's natural antiseptic properties also prevent infection and promote a healthy environment for nipple recovery, allowing mothers to continue breastfeeding comf...
